issues.title: Version 1.0.0 will trigger the error 'evalDuration is null' once the tool is called using the Olama model
issues.body: Version 1.0.0 will trigger the error 'evalDuration is null' once the tool is called using the Olama model. But after closing the tool configuration, there were no problems. The following is an example scenario where a problem occurs ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8130516c-cf22-4828-a6c2-fce98794aec4)

comments.body:
Hi, @fanxt0218 

This has been addressed already by https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/3373 
Should be released as soon as possible, it has been backported to all 1.0.X versions. 

This may be closed as duplicated and already fixed.
@fanxt0218 Closing this now. Please try the latest 1.0.1-SNAPSHOT or 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT to try the fix and re-open if you still see the issue. @BrayanMnz Thanks for the update to the issue.

Indeed, this problem will not occur anymore,But now the model won't call the MCP tool at all.
the new issue #3506

issues.title: How to passthrough Tool Calling SSE response as the final result?

comments.body:
According to the Spring AI documentation, `Flux` types cannot currently be used as return values for `@Tool` methods:

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/161c437556a3f79761c8d8991f1fa22f68cbc78e/spring-ai-docs/src/main/antora/modules/ROOT/pages/api/tools.adoc?plain=1#L679-L688

issues.title: The SQL statement of MariaDB vector MariaDBSchema Validator needs to be enclosed in quotation marks
issues.body:
**Bug description**

Execution without quotation marks will not yield results

**Environment**
spring ai 1.0.0
spring-ai-mariadb-store  1.0.0

**Steps to reproduce**

schemaValidation(true) 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4d2a1ef9-2b94-4973-b7dd-67105e2ac399)

		String sql = String.format(
				"SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = '%s' AND TABLE_NAME = '%s'",
				(schemaName == null) ? "SCHEMA()" : schemaName, tableName);

comments.body: Good catch! I pushed a PR https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3494 to try and fix the issue, thanks for the report!
